name: The Senior Source
notes: Elder financial safety, nursing home advocacy, fraud prevention. HQ in Dallas, serves Richardson/Garland area.

name: Network of Community Ministries
notes: Richardson-based food pantry and social services. Serves all 14 RISD zip codes. ~9,000 individuals annually.

name: The Warren Center
notes: Serves children with developmental delays and disabilities. Event-based and ongoing volunteer roles.

name: The Texas Ramp Project
notes: Builds free wheelchair ramps for low-income residents. Saturday morning builds, ages 16+. HQ in Richardson.

name: Feed My Starving Children
notes: Permanent meal-packing site in Richardson. Family-friendly, all ages. Very high volunteer throughput.

name: Richardson Animal Shelter
notes: City-run shelter. Orientation 1st and 3rd Wednesday monthly. Doggy Day Out, kennel care, fostering.

name: Richardson Humane Society
notes: Companion animal welfare. Foster program, adoption events, shelter support.

name: Dallas CASA
notes: Court-appointed advocates for abused/neglected children in foster care. Significant training commitment required.

name: Good Samaritans of Garland
notes: Food pantry open 5 days/week. Mon–Fri 8am–2pm shifts. Ages 16+. No zip code restrictions for recipients.

name: Habitat for Humanity of Greater Garland
notes: Builds affordable homes in Garland, Rowlett, and Sachse. Saturday build days, no experience needed.

name: The Salvation Army Garland Corps
notes: Food distribution, warming shelter, Angel Tree holiday program. Red Kettle volunteers especially needed Nov–Dec.

name: Friends of Rescue Animals (Garland Animal Services)
notes: Manages volunteer program for Garland Animal Services. Dog walks, laundry, enrichment, offsite adoption events.

name: North Texas Food Bank
notes: Regional food bank. Pack and Box shifts Tue–Thu and Sat. Ages 12+. Individual and group slots available.

name: Feed The City — Richardson
notes: Packs and distributes donated food to people in need. Family and group friendly.

name: Feed The City — Garland
notes: Meal packing and distribution. All ages welcome.

name: Local Good Pantry
notes: Hyperlocal food pantry serving Richardson area food-insecure families.

name: CARE Corps Food Pantry
notes: Serving RISD-area low-income residents since 1986. Contact-based volunteer intake at 972-234-2273.

name: City of Richardson Volunteer Programs
notes: Umbrella page for city programs: library, parks events, Eisemann Center, Volunteers in Police Services (VIPS), Trash Bash, Wildflower! Festival (1,500+ volunteers annually).

name: Heritage Farmstead Museum
notes: Historic working farm at 1900 W. 15th St, Richardson. Saturday Clean Up Days, Lights on the Farm, kitchen garden, special events. Family friendly.

name: Baylor Scott & White Medical Center — Richardson
notes: Hospital volunteer program at Richardson campus. Patient support, wayfinding, auxiliary roles.

name: St. Joseph Catholic Church — Mobile Food Pantry
notes: Mobile food pantry serving Richardson and Garland. Faith-based but open to all volunteers.

name: Creative Arts Center
notes: The Creative Arts Center in Bonham is a nonprofit organization dedicated to supporting and promoting the arts in Fannin County. Our Center has an art...
